name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Volume Detached and Attached on the Same Machine
notes: This Building Block detects volume being detached from one machine, and reattached to it in the timespan of one hour.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Volume Detached and Attached on the Same Machine on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Media Connect Attempt, Audit.Media Connect Success, Audit.Media Disconnect Attempt, Audit.Media Disconnect Success
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Volume ID (custom), Machine Identifier (custom) and different Low Level Category in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Volume ID (custom), Machine Identifier (custom) and different Low Level Category in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Volume Detached and Attached on the Same Machine on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Media Connect Attempt, Audit.Media Connect Success, Audit.Media Disconnect Attempt, Audit.Media Disconnect Success
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Volume ID (custom), Machine Identifier (custom) and different Low Level Category in 1 hour(s)
